parameters.name: vdd
parameters.override_behavior: sets twice the CLK and VOUT decision threshold

parameters.name: vcm
parameters.override_behavior: sets the common mode of VINP and VINN

parameters.name: vstart_th
parameters.override_behavior: sets the START enable and reinitialization threshold

evaluation_summary.full_credit: valid candidate and reference pass and all five negatives killed behaviorally

modeling_constraints: Gate and reinitialize the search from START and update it only on falling CLK events.
Maintain symmetric voltage-domain outputs around the public vcm parameter.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), validation hooks, hard-coded waveform sample points, or simulator-specific side channels.

properties.observable_contract: While START is below vstart_th, VINP and VINN both equal vcm and the internal search state is reset.
Each rising START crossing through vstart_th reinitializes differential value to zero, step to 20 mV, and remembered direction high.
While START is high, search updates occur only on falling CLK crossings through vdd/2.
At each enabled update, VOUT above vdd/2 moves the differential value positive and VOUT at or below vdd/2 moves it negative.
When the newly sampled decision direction differs from the remembered direction, the current step is halved before applying the move.
During search, the average of VINP and VINN remains vcm and their difference equals the accumulated differential search value.

title: Start Gated Offset Search
